Configuration.description: Logical grouping of CPE match expressions.

cpe_uri.description: CPE 2.2 URI identifying an affected product configuration.

operator.description: Logical operator (AND/OR) used in configuration node groupings.

Configuration.title: Configuration

Impact.description: Assessment of the vulnerability's impact and severity.

score.description: Numeric vulnerability score (e.g. CVSS base score).

vector.description: CVSS vector string or equivalent scoring vector expression.

Impact.title: Impact

KevCatalog.description: The CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog — the authoritative source of vulnerabilities confirmed exploited in the wild, maintained by CISA per Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01.

catalog_version.description: The version string of the KEV catalog release.

count.description: The total number of vulnerabilities in this catalog version.

date_released.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp at which this catalog version was released.

title.description: The title of the KEV catalog.

vulnerabilities.description: The list of known exploited vulnerabilities.

KevCatalog.title: KevCatalog

KevEntry.description: A single entry in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, representing one CVE that has been confirmed exploited in the wild and for which clear remediation guidance exists.

cve_id.description: The CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA). Format: CVE-YYYY-NNNNN.

date_added.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the vulnerability was added to the KEV catalog.

due_date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) by which federal civilian executive branch (FCEB) agencies must remediate the vulnerability per BOD 22-01.

impact.description: Impact and severity assessment for this vulnerability.

known_ransomware_campaign_use.description: Whether the vulnerability is known to have been leveraged as part of a ransomware campaign.

last_modified_date.description: Date and time the vulnerability record was last modified.

notes.description: Additional notes or references related to the vulnerability or its remediation.

product.description: The name of the affected product.

published_date.description: Date and time the vulnerability was first published.

references.description: External references such as advisories and articles.

required_action.description: The remediation action required, e.g. "Apply updates per vendor instructions."

short_description.description: A brief description of the vulnerability.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the vulnerability record.

title.description: Short human-readable title or name for this entity.

vendor_project.description: The name of the vendor or project responsible for the affected product.

vulnerability_name.description: A short, descriptive name for the vulnerability.

weaknesses.description: Weakness classifications (e.g. CWE) associated with this vulnerability.

KevEntry.title: KevEntry

KnownRansomwareCampaignUseEnum.description: Whether the vulnerability is known to have been used in ransomware campaigns.
KnownRansomwareCampaignUseEnum.title: KnownRansomwareCampaignUseEnum

Product.description: Software or hardware entity affected by the vulnerability.

name.description: Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc.).

vendor.description: Name of the vendor or organization responsible for the product.

version.description: Version string of the affected product.

Product.title: Product

Reference.description: External reference such as an advisory or article.

name.description: Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc.).

source.description: Source or origin of the reference or data.

url.description: URL pointing to the reference resource.

Reference.title: Reference

VulnerabilityStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a vulnerability record.
VulnerabilityStatus.title: VulnerabilityStatus

Weakness.description: Weakness classification from CWE or a similar taxonomy.

cwe_id.description: CWE identifier for the weakness classification (e.g. CWE-79).

name.description: Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc.).
